cases.name: BED-6695 negated incoming pattern predicate with contains filter remains row-correlated
cases.cypher: match (g:NodeKind1) where g.name contains 'BED-6695 KEY ADMINS' and not ((g)<-[:EdgeKind1]-(:NodeKind2)) return count(g)

cases.name: BED-6695 flipped equivalent pattern predicate returns the same count
cases.cypher: match (g:NodeKind1) where g.name contains 'BED-6695 KEY ADMINS' and not ((:NodeKind2)-[:EdgeKind1]->(g)) return count(g)

cases.name: BED-6695 positive incoming pattern predicate with contains filter remains row-correlated
cases.cypher: match (g:NodeKind1) where g.name contains 'BED-6695 KEY ADMINS' and (g)<-[:EdgeKind1]-(:NodeKind2) return count(g)

cases.name: BED-6695 negated incoming pattern predicate without property filter remains row-correlated
